data.title: Capital Square's The Nickel Hotel Wins 2026 CoStar Impact Award for Charleston Commercial Development of the Year
data.description: In Charleston, South Carolina on April 16, 2026, Capital Square, a prominent sponsor specializing in tax-advantaged real estate investments and a nationwide developer and manager of housing communities, revealed that The Nickel Hotel has clinched the prestigious title of Charleston's 2026 CoStar Impact Award recipient. This recognition serves as a testament to the outstanding contributions made by The Nickel Hotel towards the real estate sector in the city.

data.title: Spectrum Science Appoints Lisa Talbot to Lead Communications Business
data.description: Talbot has been appointed as President of Spectrum Science Communications, with a primary focus on driving growth, enhancing integrated communications services, and revolutionizing healthcare storytelling in the modern era. This announcement was made in Washington on April 16, 2026. Spectrum Science is an independent, full-service organization dedicated to this transformation, and under Talbot's leadership, it aims to achieve significant milestones in these areas.

data.title: OceanaGold Provides Notice of First Quarter 2026 Results, Conference Call, and 2026 Annual Meeting of the Shareholders
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on April 16, 2026, OceanaGold Corporation (TSX: OGC) (NYSE: OGC) announced that it will unveil its operational and financial performance for the initial quarter of 2026 post-market closure on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The Company's results will be accessible on...

data.title: Defense Metals Announces Inclusion in New Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China ETF
data.description: Defense Metals Corp., a company listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol DEFN, on the OTCQB as DFMTF, and on the FSE as 35D, is currently concentrating on advancing the Wicheeda Rare Earth Project near Prince George, British Columbia, Canada.

data.title: Araceli Biosciences Appoints Christine Tsingos to Board of Directors
data.description: Christine A. Tsingos, former EVP & CFO at Bio-Rad, joins Araceli Biosciences' Board of Directors to bolster the company's growth. The announcement was made on April 16, 2026, in Portland, Oregon. Tsingos brings with her extensive experience in the sector, finance, and governance, positioning Araceli for its next phase of expansion.

data.title: AlphaGen Withdraws Retirement Notices for Gowanus & Narrows Generating Stations Following NYISO Reliability Determinations
data.description: Alpha Generation Services, LLC, the manager of the Eastern Generation, LLC portfolio, based in Stamford, Conn., revealed on April 16, 2026, that it has officially withdrawn the Notices of Intent to Retire for the Gowanus and Narrows Generating Stations.

data.title: "PLAYED BY HUMANS" MOVEMENT IS THE ANSWER TO TRANSPARENCY IN MUSIC
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 16, 2026, TBWA\Chiat\Day LA and Jazz Is Dead, a music-based cultural art project, unveiled "Played by Humans." This initiative serves as a marker of authenticity for musicians and audiences to confirm music's human origins. Aimed at ensuring genuine musical creation, it offers a unique way to verify content in response to the growing trend of AI-generated music.

data.title: Card My Yard earns dual honors as a Top Low-Cost Franchise for 2026 by Franchise Business Review and Entrepreneur
data.description: A brand known for its focus on celebrations has been acknowledged by industry experts for its easy entry into startup investment, with satisfied owners and a versatile, community-centered business approach. Headquartered in Austin, Texas, on April 16, 2026, Card My Yard, a leading franchise offering yard greetings, has gained recognition for these aspects.

data.title: Cyted Health's US Laboratory Achieves College of American Pathologists Accreditation
data.description: A prominent gastrointestinal molecular diagnostics company, Cyted Health, has revealed on April 16, 2026, that they are currently conducting a clinical validation study at various locations in the United States. The company, headquartered in WILMINGTON, Del., and CAMBRIDGE, England, shared that their laboratory in the US has successfully accomplished this milestone. The study spans across multiple sites and is aimed at validating their technology and methods. This news signifies a significant step for Cyted Health as they work towards further establishing their presence in the field.

data.title: DuPont Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: DuPont, a leading company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DD, is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 5th, at 6:00 a.m. ET. Following this, at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day, DuPont will conduct a conference call. The meeting will also be available for live viewing via webcast.

data.title: 2026 Datassential 500 Preview Reveals How Value Is Reshaping Top Restaurant Chains
data.description: Datassential has recently published the Datassential 500 report, extracted from its vast database of over 18,000 restaurant chains. This report aims to showcase the impact of changing perceptions of value on the performance of leading restaurant chains in the industry. Released on April 16, 2026 in Chicago, the report delves into how these evolving definitions of value are influencing the success of top restaurant chains.

data.title: Fitness Equipment Market Size to Reach USD 18.4 Billion by 2033, Growing at a CAGR of 3.02% | Allied Market Research
data.description: The global fitness equipment industry is undergoing a transformation due to the increase in IoT-enabled smart equipment, a rise in home fitness adoption, and the expansion of corporate wellness programs. A recent report by Allied Market Research highlights these shifts. The report, released from WILMINGTON, Del., on April 16, 2026, delves into the industry's changing landscape. Key trends include a substantial rise in the use of smart equipment, a surge in the adoption of home fitness solutions, and the growth of corporate wellness initiatives. This evolution is expected to significantly impact the industry, with projected growth numbers reflecting the changing dynamics.

data.title: Kontoor Brands Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Conference Call Date
data.description: Kontoor Brands, Inc. (NYSE: KTB) from Greensboro, N.C., is set to disclose its first quarter financial outcomes for 2026 on Thursday, May 7th, 2026, around 6:50 a.m. ET. The company will then conduct a conference call at approximately 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day for a review of the results. The conference call will be live-streamed on kontoorbrands.com/investors. In case of missing the live session, an archived version will be made available later on.

data.title: Atmus Filtration Technologies to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 1, 2026
data.description: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc., a prominent player in the filtration sector trading on NYSE under the ticker ATMU, disclosed its plan to release the financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 on Friday, May 1, 2026, before the market opens. Subsequently, a conference call is scheduled for the same day at 10:00 a.m. CT to converse over the financial results with investors. Both a live webcast and a replay of the conference call will be available through the Atmus investor relations platform.

data.title: US Foods to Host First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp (NYSE: USFD) is set to discuss its first quarter 2026 results through a live conference call and webcast on May 7, 2026, at 8 a.m. CDT. To participate, individuals can join the call by dialing 877-344-2001 and providing the Conference ID 2528845 at least 10 minutes before the scheduled start time. A post-call replay will also be accessible. For those interested in listening to the replay of the conference call, registration is required.

data.title: BD Earns Industry Top Honors for Transparency, Resiliency and Partnership
data.description: A globally recognized medical technology company, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), based in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, was recently announced as the sole supplier to be honored by the Healthcare Industry Resilience Collaborative (HIRC). This recognition came during HIRC's inaugural Member Choice event held on April 16, 2026. BD, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol BDX, stands out in the industry for its innovative contributions.

data.title: Insteel Industries Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Mount Airy, North Carolina, Insteel Industries Inc. (NYSE: IIIN), known as the leading producer of steel wire reinforcing products for concrete construction in the U.S., disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, concluding on March 28, 2026. Key figures from the Second Quarter 2026 include net earnings hitting $5.2 million, equivalent to $0.27 per share, with net sales reaching $172.7 million. The gross profit stood at $16.5 million, accounting for 9.6% of net sales, while the company's net cash balance was reported at $1 million.

data.title: Blockstream CEO advocates for voluntary upgrades to make Bitcoin quantum-proof, in opposition to BIP-361 which mandates freezes on quantum-vulnerable Bitcoin.
data.description: The CEO of Blockstream has a different perspective compared to BIP-361, a proposal suggesting enforced pauses for quantum-exposed Bitcoin.

data.title: Miami International Holdings Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Miami International Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: MIAX), a top-notch technology-focused company specializing in managing regulated financial markets spanning various asset classes, is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter closing in March. Based out of Princeton, N.J. and Miami, the organization is known for its robust market performance and strategic initiatives. Stay tuned for detailed insights and figures on their quarterly performance.

data.title: Blue Moon Announces Results of Nussir Project Feasibility Study
data.description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. is pleased to report robust economic performance, with an average annual free cash flow of $77 million based on consensus prices. The company, listed on both TSXV as MOON and NASDAQ as BMM, has successfully completed a feasibility study.
